task: dat-kit open-platform Phase 5 external gates (Gate 1-4) — real push+Actions, Windows Git Bash smoke, real v1.16 project migration (owner's blog), live Claude Code + Codex host smokes
notes: First real push of feature/open-platform-v2 (Gate 1) surfaced 2 CI-only defects never caught by sandbox verification: PROJECTION_BYTE_MISMATCH on skills/{build-loop,knowledge-work}/SKILL.md (Windows job only -- .gitattributes did not pin generated projections to eol=lf, so Windows checkout autocrlf normalized committed LF to CRLF while render.py emits LF) and ShellCheck SC2015 on init.sh (A&&B||C shape, never run on this branch before). Fixed in ba77045: .gitattributes gains skills/**/SKILL.md text eol=lf; init.sh rewritten to explicit if/then/fi, behavior-preserving (verified via standalone 3-case logic test). Red-before-green: reproduced the exact Windows bug via git clone -c core.autocrlf=true at the pre-fix commit, then proved green at ba77045 with the same simulation. Real Actions run 29744500620 on ba77045: Status Success, both validate+windows-python jobs green. code-reviewer APPROVE (0 blocking, 2 lesson candidates); security-reviewer skipped with stated reason (no registry/migration/path-logic surface touched). Gate 2: fresh git clone in real Windows Git Bash, init.sh --here --profile react (17 created, exit 0), contract_check exit 0, dat-kit 2.0 marker, idempotent rerun (0 created 17 skipped) verified. Gate 3: owner's real blog project (D:\project\blog, dirty WIP tree) -- tested via an isolated clone to avoid touching live WIP; migration-plan matched a clean case (AGENTS.md + .cursorrules byte-identical to shipped 1.16 template except name/revision line); applied on the clone -> contract_check exit 0; docs/agent-working-rules.md (real project policy, ~140 lines) sha256-identical before/after and correctly absent from the plan entirely; real blog repo never touched. Gate 4: Claude Code (--plugin-dir, fresh session) correctly cited real repo state and evidence file paths, proving pack read outside skills/, and correctly stopped at an open decision instead of building (instructed to stand down). Codex (codex exec, fresh session, plugin installed via a scratch local marketplace descriptor with source:url+ref:branch after discovering marketplace add --ref only affects which marketplace.json revision is fetched, not the nested per-plugin ref) confirmed pack read of all 6 domain-pack slot files + engine files via session JSONL transcript -- but the run (sandbox workspace-write, approval never) over-executed on its own initiative: re-ran parts of gates 1-2, attempted and failed to invoke Claude Code itself (its own sandbox-local EPERM/OAuth issue, not a product defect), and wrote a handoff file + scorecard append unprompted. Both artifacts were uncommitted and reverted (not a rewrite of committed history). Cursor manual checklist not gathered (owner does not have it installed) -- recorded as a known gap, not assumed; Gemini correctly stays out of scope (repo_only, separate activation track).
gates: GitHub Actions run 29744500620: validate PASS, windows-python PASS (real, both jobs, commit ba77045); Windows Git Bash smoke PASS incl. idempotent rerun; real v1.16 migration (isolated clone of owner's blog) -> contract_check exit 0, project-owned policy byte-identical; Claude Code host smoke PASS (pack read + correct decision-gate discipline); Codex host smoke PASS (pack read, all 6 domain-pack files + engine files confirmed via transcript) with 1 side-effect reverted (unauthorized handoff+scorecard write, discarded uncommitted); code-reviewer APPROVE 0 blocking on the CI-fix commit; security-reviewer skipped with stated reason; Cursor checklist not gathered (known gap)

task: dat-kit open-platform Phase 5 step 11 — migration guide + release notes + release/1.x verification + owner-requested self-audit + v2.0.0 tag (supersedes the 07:58 record: corrects an unverifiable model claim and covers the audit work that followed it)
notes: CORRECTION of the 07:58:00 record. Two things were wrong or incomplete there. (1) MODEL: that line asserted 'Claude Opus 4.8'. The session environment reported claude-opus-4-8 at start, but the owner stated mid-session that they had just switched the model to Opus 4.8 — which implies the earlier portion may have run on a different tier. An agent cannot verify its own model from inside the session, so the honest value is 'unverified'; the original assertion was not a fact I could establish. (2) SCOPE: the 07:58 record stopped at head 238d7fb, but the owner then requested a self-audit which found five real defects, all fixed before the tag was published — F1: §13.1 item 13 was marked CLOSED citing the v2.0.0 tag as receipt four commits before the tag existed (closing on assumption, forbidden by D-RC-B); F2: the first handoff, committed into the tree the tag was placed on, asserted the tag had not been cut; F3: two unfilled placeholders survived into evidence.md — the exact defect the self-referential-pointer lesson appended earlier the same session warns about; F4: the README roadmap left v2.0.0 unticked and still listed 'migration guide, tag' as remaining, inside the tree being tagged v2.0.0; F5: plan-reviewer was never dispatched (build-loop step 3) and the skip was never declared. The first tag was deleted while still local and re-cut on the corrected commit 1ec1a15, with item-13 closure moved to a post-tag commit (060e1e8) — the only non-circular place a tag's own hash can be recorded. Two further lessons appended. Net honest read of this phase: the deliverables were sound, but the closing discipline was not, and it took an owner-prompted audit rather than the loop's own checks to catch it.
gates: pytest 275 passed 3 skipped (re-run 6x across the session as fixes landed); validate.py '✓ all checks green' exit 0 (red at session start on D-11-F, green after fix, re-verified after every subsequent commit incl. the post-tag closure); render.py --check exit 0; release/1.x own-era gates in isolated worktree at ee4b982: pytest 88 passed 3 skipped, validate.py exit 0. code-reviewer APPROVE (1 MINOR, fixed); security-reviewer SKIPPED with stated reason; plan-reviewer NOT RUN (F5, undeclared at the time — recorded as a lesson). Tag v2.0.0 = object 9bb07fe on commit 1ec1a15, local only, not pushed.
